heading: Functions
label: 1302 Functions
text: Except as otherwise provided in the ICC Termination Act of 1995, or the amendments made thereby, the Board shall perform all functions that, immediately before , were functions of the Interstate Commerce Commission or were performed by any officer or employee of the Interstate Commerce Commission in the capacity as such officer or employee.January 1, 1996
notes: References in TextThe ICC Termination Act of 1995, referred to in text, is , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title of 1995 Amendment note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 104–88109 Stat. 803section 101 of this titleDec. 29, 1995
